name: Magic Missile
description: Creates 1d4+1 missiles that strike unerringly for 1d4+1 damage each.

name: Shield
description: Creates an invisible shield that grants AC 2 vs. missile attacks and AC 4 vs. melee.

name: Sleep
description: Puts 2d8 HD of creatures to sleep, starting with lowest HD.

name: Identify
description: Reveals properties of a magical item including function and charges.

name: Protection from Evil
description: Creates a barrier against summoned/conjured evil creatures; they cannot touch caster.

name: Grease
description: Creates slippery surface causing creatures to fall or items to be hard to grasp.

name: Feather Fall
description: Slows falling rate to 1 ft per round, preventing damage.

name: Jump
description: Grants jumping ability: 30 ft horizontal or 15 ft vertical leap.

name: Light
description: Creates bright light in area; can be cast on objects or creatures.

name: Detect Magic
description: Reveals magical auras within the area of effect.

name: Read Magic
description: Allows reading of magical inscriptions, scrolls, and glyphs.

name: Charm Person
description: Makes humanoid creature regard caster as trusted friend.

name: Hold Person
description: Paralyzes humanoid creatures, preventing any movement or action.

name: Web
description: Creates sticky webs that trap creatures; strength determines breaking free.

name: Invisibility
description: Makes subject invisible; ends if subject attacks.

name: Mirror Image
description: Creates 1d4 duplicate images of caster that absorb attacks.

name: Stinking Cloud
description: Creates nauseating gas that causes retching and inability to act.

name: Knock
description: Opens locked, barred, or magically held containers.

name: Levitate
description: Causes subject to rise or descend at will up to 120 ft total.

name: Continual Light
description: Creates permanent bright light; blinds creatures if cast on them.

name: Darkness 15' Radius
description: Creates supernatural darkness that normal light cannot penetrate.

name: Scare
description: Causes creatures of less than 6 HD to flee in panic.

name: Fireball
description: Creates explosive burst dealing 1d6 damage per caster level (max 10d6).

name: Lightning Bolt
description: Creates bolt dealing 1d6 damage per level (max 10d6); bounces back if hits wall.

name: Fly
description: Grants flight speed of 12, maneuverability class based on DEX.

name: Haste
areaOfEffect: Up to 4 creatures/level in 40 ft cube
description: Doubles movement and attack rate; ages recipient upon expiration.

name: Slow
areaOfEffect: Up to 4 creatures/level in 40 ft cube
description: Halves movement and attack rate of affected creatures.

name: Dispel Magic
description: Removes magical effects equal to or below caster's level.

name: Protection from Evil 10' Radius
description: Extended version protecting entire party from evil creatures.

name: Blink
description: Caster blinks in and out of existence, avoiding 50% of attacks.

name: Water Breathing
description: Allows recipients to breathe underwater.

name: Clairvoyance
description: Allows mental viewing of distant location known to caster.

name: Clairaudience
description: Allows mental hearing of distant location known to caster.

name: Monster Summoning I
description: Summons 1d3 small monsters to serve caster.

name: Polymorph Self
description: Allows caster to transform into any creature of similar mass.

name: Fire Shield
description: Creates shield of flame or ice that damages attackers.

name: Ice Storm
description: Creates hailstorm dealing 3d10 damage in area.

name: Wall of Fire
description: Creates curtain of fire dealing 2d4 damage to those passing through.

name: Confusion
areaOfEffect: Up to 4 creatures/level in 30 ft cube
description: Causes creatures to act randomly: attack allies, wander, or do nothing.

name: Fear
description: Causes intense fear; creatures flee or cower helplessly.

name: Dimension Door
description: Teleports caster up to 360 feet instantly.

name: Minor Globe of Invulnerability
description: Creates immobile barrier that blocks spells of 3rd level or lower.

name: Remove Curse
description: Frees victim from curse or allows removal of cursed item.

name: Cloudkill
description: Creates poisonous cloud that kills creatures under 4 HD outright.

name: Cone of Cold
description: Creates cone of cold dealing 1d4+1 damage per level (max 50 hp).

name: Telekinesis
description: Moves objects or creatures by force of will up to 20 ft/round.

name: Passwall
description: Creates temporary passage through solid stone or wood.

name: Teleport
description: Instantly transports caster to known destination; accuracy varies.

name: Contact Other Plane
description: Allows communication with extraplanar entity for yes/no questions.

name: Feeblemind
description: Reduces wizard's intelligence to animal-like state permanently.

name: Death Spell
description: Kills 2d8 HD of creatures outright, starting with lowest HD.

name: Disintegrate
description: Completely destroys target creature or object, leaving only dust.

name: Globe of Invulnerability
description: Creates immobile barrier blocking spells of 4th level or lower.

name: Tenser's Transformation
description: Transforms caster into fighting machine with fighter THAC0 and HP.

name: Chain Lightning
description: Creates lightning bolt that arcs between multiple targets.

name: Project Image
description: Creates illusory duplicate that can cast spells from caster's position.

name: Power Word Blind
description: Blinds creature with 100 HP or less for 1d6+1 turns.

name: Limited Wish
description: Alters reality to achieve nearly any goal, but with limitations.

name: Prismatic Spray
description: Creates seven-colored beam with various effects per color.

name: Spell Turning
description: Reflects targeted spells back at their casters.

name: Teleport Without Error
description: Perfect teleportation with no chance of error.

name: Maze
description: Traps victim in extradimensional maze; intelligence determines escape time.

name: Power Word Stun
description: Stuns creature with 120 HP or less for 1d6+1 rounds.

name: Symbol
description: Creates powerful glyph with various effects (death, pain, persuasion, etc.).

name: Clone
description: Creates duplicate body that soul inhabits upon original's death.

name: Wish
description: The most powerful spell; can alter reality itself. Limited to one per week.

name: Time Stop
description: Stops time for everyone except caster, allowing free action.

name: Meteor Swarm
description: Creates four explosive spheres dealing 2d4+20 damage each.

name: Shape Change
description: Allows caster to assume form of any creature, gaining its abilities.
